explicit_text: My full name is Ricky Lawrence Brinkley, but everyone calls me Rick Brinkley. I was born on July 25th, 1961, in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma. Throughout my life, I've had a diverse career including working in television in Tulsa, Baltimore, and New York City, and later becoming a pastor in Collinsville. I've also struggled with a gambling addiction that began in my early forties while working at the Better Business Bureau. Family and faith have always been central to who I am.

explicit_text: My father, Donald Daniel Brinkley, was from Monticello, Arkansas. His early life was tough; his father died in a bus accident when my dad was eight, and he had to drop out of school to pick cotton and later drove a taxi cab at 13. Despite these hardships, he became a respected general manager of a car dealership in Tulsa and was a beloved figure in the community.
